name: Chicken Kiev #2 (Mndg76a) 1i27
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut butter into 12 pieces and chill until very firm.
2. Remove skin and bones from chicken breasts.
3. Pound each piece of chicken on a wet board to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
4. Sprinkle each cutlet lightly with salt and pepper.
5. Place a piece of butter in the center of each cutlet and fold the cutlet snugly over the butter on both sides.
6. Roll the meat around the butter, securing it securely with toothpicks.
7. Whisk water into eggs, then roll each cutlet in crumbs, followed by the egg mixture.
8. Roll each cutlet again in crumbs.
9. Place the cutlets on waxed paper and chill for 1 hour.
10. Fry the cutlets in deep fat for 3 to 5 minutes.
Makes 6 servings.
